deals.notes: Land development opportunity. Isaac Linares mobile home project with veteran units. Listing expired, signs picked up. No path forward. Title defect confirmed and attorney engaged.

logs.m: Listing canceled. Signs retrieved. Deal terminated.
Title defect confirmed. Attorney Van Hutchins hired for Correction Deed.

deals.title: 340 Sollock Dr — Devine Residential
deals.notes: Residential listing. Underwater by 93k-143k. VA loan 5.25%. Sellers moved back in. Agreement exp Jul 31. Plan to relist after updates and repairs.

logs.m: Listing terminated by mutual agreement. Sellers moving back in.
Honest conversation completed. Chandler was laid off. Short sale likely path.

deals.title: 485 W FM 462 — Moore Land/Home
deals.notes: 3BR/2BA on 4.05 acres. Frio County. Divorce forced sale. Payoff 257k. Need 285k-290k to walk with proceeds. Recommended list 295k.
deals.next: Get updated payoff letter. Get listing agreement signed.

logs.m: Met at property. CMA pulled. Net sheet built. Payoff confirmed 255,578 as of Feb.

deals.title: 10023 Mill Path — San Antonio Home
deals.notes: 3BR/2.5BA. Listed 259,900. Sellers relocating NC second week June. Multiple interested buyers. Second-look buyers are hottest lead. Foundation crack noted.
deals.next: Confirm showing time. Follow up on second-look buyers. Monitor for backup offer.

logs.m: Second-look buyers came back. Their favorite. Pre-inspection report offered.
Investor cash offer 176,300 discussed. Conversation kept open.

deals.title: 181 CR 7751 — Devine REO
deals.notes: Bank-owned. Cleanup nearly complete. Electric reconnected. Flooring this week. Water meter pending. HouzzPro contractor. Work started May 9.
deals.next: Call Medina Electric. Call EMCSUD. Replace camera batteries. Police report follow-up. Submit listing agreement to bank.

logs.m: Visited property. Cameras installed. Electricians reconnected. Drywall complete. Flooring starts.
Drywall crew patching. Sent photos to Kelly.

New buyers Espinoza family. TXR 1903 amendment sent to Javier. Another agent called with backup.

logs.m: Officially closed and funded. Lien release delivered Apr 21.
Fernando Castillo signed lien release at mobile notary. Released to Chicago Title.

deals.next: Monitor for other buyer interest. Josh LT interested backup.

logs.m: Howell buyers out of deal. Too much for them. Still searching.
Connected Mike and Alice with Isaac. Zach sent property info. LT flagged as backup buyer.

deals.notes: Lennar home Grace Gardens. Rental arrangement ended. Payment 500 received. Release signed. Ended on good terms.

logs.m: Release sent. Payment received. Ended professionally on good terms.

leads.detail: Out of Corpus deal. Still searching. Rental property being sold. Pivoting to new construction no HOA. Pre-approved with Zach Schaphorst approximately 122k.
leads.next: Revisit new construction search. Confirm Zach pre-approval status.

leads.title: Bryce & Wife
leads.detail: Met on-site at 181 CR 7751. Wife is active military VA eligible. Recently moved from Ohio. Renting. Looking to buy San Antonio area. Strong VA loan profile.
leads.next: Get Bryce contact. Qualify wife VA eligibility. Connect with VA lender. Send VA Buyers Guide.

leads.detail: Downline agent Schertz Cibolo. Buyer interested in fixer property. Unique situation needs clarification.
leads.next: Follow up Jerome. Get full buyer and property details. Identify matching inventory.

leads.title: Brandon Moran
leads.detail: Long-standing relationship. Chris mentored on real estate. Green Bliss rental setup (uncle Jimbo). Mom Milagros buyer for new construction Grace Gardens. Budget 50k down 1000/mo target.
leads.next: Confirm visit Wed/Thu. Register as buyer agent before builder visit. Get mom contact info.

leads.title: Armando
leads.detail: David Roth referral. Employee buyer program. Budget 50k down 1000/mo target. Open to multiple builders. No aging commissions if 5% down plus incentives.
leads.next: Get contact from David. Pull new construction options. Present and set builder visits.

leads.detail: Age 18 finishing senior year. Interested in real estate. Referred by Julie (veteran buyer). Want to know about licensing process and eXp.
leads.next: Get contact from Julie. Intro call explain licensing and eXp. Check Skool website engagement.

leads.detail: Neighbor around 9815 Conbes corner. Watching nearby listing at 275k. Wants intel on offers. Possible seller or buyer lead.
leads.next: Pull CMA for Kurt area. Get listing agent intel on 9815 Conbes offers. Report back to Kurt.
